# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it presents an unpublished research manuscript with explicit empirical evaluation.

## Why

The excerpt shows a formal arXiv preprint that introduces a method and reports measurable results across named benchmarks, including accuracy improvements of up to 20% relative to baselines on GAIA, BrowseComp, and Humanity's Last Exam. That is real experimental substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits
